subject: A large muscular yellow-green skinned humanoid fighter in a wide aggressive stance, surrounded by crackling red-yellow energy — likely Baby-possessed Vegeta in a powered-up form
description: A large, powerfully built humanoid figure stands in a wide combat stance, arms raised aggressively. The figure has a distinctive yellow-green complexion and bulging musculature. Red and yellow crackling energy radiates outward from the figure in jagged streaks. The expression is one of open-mouthed fury or battle roar. The background is consumed by the energy discharge and flame-like light effects. This reads as a possessed or transformed state — the unusual skin color and raw rage suggest Baby's influence over a host body, likely Vegeta in a Great Ape-adjacent powered form.
foreground: Large yellow-green muscular fighter in wide stance, roaring, red-yellow energy crackling outward
background: Red and yellow energy flame discharge
